---
title: "Andres Romero-Bravo"
subtitle: "Plant Evolutionary Biologist"
image: images/profile_photo.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/andresarb
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:andres.romero_bravo@biol.lu.se
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/aromerobravo
      target: _blank
    - icon: bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/a-romerobravo.bsky.social
      target: _blank
css: index-styles.css
---

Hi! I am a plant evolutionary biologist working on floral evolution, 
plant–pollinator interactions, and adaptation to environmental change.

[Learn more about me](about.qmd) · [My research](research.qmd) · [CV](cv.qmd)
